verdicts.reason: Claim narrows instrumental motivation to personal development/growth, a subset of candidates that list efficiency + personal development; compatible, no conflict.
Same transition source 'Research Associate' but claim targets 'Chief Research Scientist' vs candidate 'Lead Research Scientist' — incompatible value.
Candidate states fear of snakes due to unpredictable movements; claim states fascination due to mysterious movements — opposite sentiment on same subject.
Both update monthly_income from 15000, but claim to 13000 vs candidate to 12000 — incompatible target value.
Same preference-change-for-balanced-lifestyle but claim says black tea vs candidate matcha green tea — incompatible value.
Candidates frame goal as heart health AND reducing diabetes rates; diabetes commitment is supported, not conflicting.
Candidates state mindfulness practices to maintain health in educational role; yoga is not stated or implied, but not strictly incompatible.
Candidate states gratitude for network support facilitating 'global and regional partnerships'; claim's 'regional' is a supported subset.
Candidates directly support sharing herbal-tea insights in health workshops to inspire others.
Candidates list titles like Founder/CEO, Chief Visionary Officer, Executive Director; 'AI Research Consultant' is a new title none state or imply, but no explicit conflicting transition.

Candidate says Donna acknowledged compensatory motivation emphasizing both innate talent AND balanced work-life; claim says it was less significant, favoring natural ability over work-life balance — opposite stance.
Same travel-preference modification for data collection but claim says remote/isolated locations vs candidate crowded tourist spots — opposite value.
Candidate notes increased competition but frames collaboration as improved; claim's 'social relationships decreased' and 'tension in his role' is an ungrounded embellishment, not a clean conflict.
Same Jul 13 2032 training session but claim says cat training challenging 'cats too independent' vs candidate dog training challenging 'dogs too demanding' — incompatible specifics.
Candidates attribute pets to welcoming atmosphere/security; claim asserts pets boost 'culinary appeal' — incompatible rationale for same subject+attribute.
Established lineage is healthcare/community->consulting and 'works in healthcare'; claim reverses to consulting->healthcare services, conflicting with the recorded direction.
A candidate explicitly states her reading includes self-help books on personal wellness and mindfulness.
Candidates say 'maintaining his health'; 'fitness' is a compatible paraphrase, not a conflict.
Candidates show Donna broadened pet preference to dogs and values their companionship; exploring her dog's behavior is compatible.
Same company-name change from AccessTech Innovations but candidate destination is EmpowerTech Innovations vs claim's TechEmpower Solutions.
A candidate identifies NewConnection7 as an academic collaborator expanding her platform's reach, matching the claim.
Candidate states yoga benefits flexibility and mindfulness; claim asserts cardiovascular health — incompatible benefit for same subject+attribute.
Candidates describe her part-time transition and support received but never state the cause; 'desire to spend more time with family' is an ungrounded addition that does not conflict.
Candidate specifies collaborating with filmmakers and critics; claim says actors and producers — different collaborators for same attribute.
Candidates attribute health-status change to retirement transition/stress (consultancy/research), not a new business venture; claim's stated cause conflicts.
Candidates state strategy games with historical battles; claim says futuristic battles — incompatible value for same preference.
Candidates say Golden Retrievers are energetic and Christopher reconsidered/sought a quieter pet; claim says he decided to adopt one after seeing calm behavior.
Candidates describe transitions to business/smart casual attire; claim asserts a shift to formal business attire (dated 2028) — incompatible direction for the same attire-change attribute.
Same from-value 30000 but to-value/reason differs from candidate '30000 to 0'.
Same event and date (Aug 10, 2026) but candidate states emerged with resilience/professional vision, not art/creativity.
Same pet-expo event but reinforced 'exotic/unique' vs candidate 'non-intimidating' pets.
Candidates frame violent films as educational/insightful; claim asserts entertainment value, incompatible motivation.
Candidate attributes exclusive experiences/expert insights to group tours, claim attributes to solo travel.
Candidates include financial independence influencing exploring new cultures; compatible paraphrase.
No candidate mentions shifting platform focus to environmental issues; plausible but ungrounded.
Candidate: motivated to support relative's political career; claim: establish his own political career.
Candidates: switch to flavored sparkling water; claim: switch to herbal tea, incompatible value.
Candidates: vintage wines/historical traditions; claim: modern wines/contemporary innovations.
Candidate: creative motivation to inspire ideas/overcome creative blocks; claim: physical motivation for exercise.
Candidate: choosing between family recipes and regional variations; claim: international cuisines, different value.
Candidate states integrating interactive elements into his workshops; compatible with developing interactive workshops.
Exact paraphrase present verbatim among candidates.
Claim says focus on luxury rather than integrating pets; candidate states commitment to integrating pets into the B&B experience. Direct conflict on same intent.
Specific bird preference for calming atmosphere/entertainment is not stated or implied by candidates, which only note generic pet preferences. No conflict either.
Claim says 'adult nutrition' while all candidates consistently state 'children's nutrition'. Incompatible value for same attribute.
Claim emphasizes sticking to structured plans for predictability; candidates emphasize balancing structure with flexibility, spontaneity, and adaptability. Conflicting travel philosophy.
Claim says uncertain and hesitant about pursuing the life goal; candidate says felt empowered and ready to pursue the same goal. Opposite emotional state.
Claim attributes reliance to 'family network'; candidate states 'professional network' with otherwise identical phrasing. Incompatible value.
Job title 'Research Coordinator' appears in none of the candidate title transitions; a new specific value not stated, but titles evolve so no clear conflict.
Claim says motivated by professional success; candidate says same commitment motivated by emotional resonance. Same attribute, different motivation value.
Claim says music genres impacted creative process; candidate says literary genres (incl. poetry) impacted creative process. Conflicting genre type for same anecdote.
Candidate explicitly states Donna plans to explore tech hubs like Silicon Valley and beyond; excitement about innovative solutions there is compatible.
Candidate states she is planning to use savings strategically during her career transition; seeking financial stability is compatible with that financial framing.
Claim says reducing medical care to focus on professional responsibilities; candidate says integrating increased medical care while maintaining responsibilities. Opposite direction.

Claim says social motivation is developing new culinary experiences; candidate says social motivation is expressing identity/improving lifestyle through travel. Different content for same motivation type.
Claim says desire to integrate more seafood as of Aug 30, 2026; candidates all describe a plant-based transition on the same date. Incompatible dietary direction.
Claim is a subset of candidate 1 which states both within-industry exploration and outside-industry independent films; compatible.
'technical precision and emotional expression' paraphrases candidate's 'artistic and athletic elements' balancing challenge in synchronized swimming.
Candidate states international/global recognition; claim says national/local. Same attribute, incompatible scope.

Comfort-over-style and evolving preferences are supported (candidates 1,3), but the specific inclusion of polo shirts is not stated by any candidate.
